name: plans-public
_note: Public, no auth. Top-level JSON array of plan rows. No fields ignored: plan rows are static seed data, every column (id, name, daily_limit, price_cents, billing_period, ...) must match byte-for-byte. If Go emits a per-row created_at/updated_at that Node omits (or vice versa) the gate must flag it — do NOT add timestamps to ignore_value_of to paper over a real shape diff.
